message:
test(quic_h3): complete E2-E6 deterministic E2E suite (60 new tests, 72 total)

E2: 12 happy-path tests — uni/bidi streams, large transfers, FIN,
    graceful close with in-flight data, flow control, reassembly.
E3: 12 loss/PTO/congestion tests — selective ACK, time-threshold loss,
    PTO fire/backoff/reset, cwnd reduction, RTT estimation, recovery.
E4: 12 H3 lifecycle tests — request-response, concurrent requests,
    SETTINGS exchange, GOAWAY boundary, CANCEL_PUSH, MAX_PUSH_ID,
    error handling, state transitions, QPACK coverage.
E5: 10 cancellation/drain tests — Cx cancel, close_immediately,
    drain with streams, reset/stop, double close, timeout boundary.
E6: 14 protocol violation tests — write/open after close, invalid
    transitions, bad stream IDs, H3 frame errors, truncated codecs,
    ConnectionId overflow, send on reset stream.

All tests deterministic (DetRng + DetClock, no tokio).

Closes: asupersync-3narc.5.2.2, asupersync-3narc.5.2.3,
        asupersync-3narc.5.2.4, asupersync-3narc.5.2.5,
        asupersync-3narc.5.2.6

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
